vitals.surface: mixed paved and gravel (42 km gravel on long route)
vitals.aid_stations: multiple, including private stops for some packages

course_description.overview: Amateur event mirroring the pro Strade Bianche with iconic white gravel sectors through Tuscan countryside, punchy climbs on paved sections, finishing on the steep cobbled Via Santa Caterina into Siena's Piazza del Campo. Long route: 137.7 km, 2000 m elevation, 10 gravel sections; Medio Fondo: 87 km, 1350 m elevation, 6 gravel sections.

key_segments.name: Strade Bianche gravel sectors
key_segments.description: Compacted clay roads, dusty when dry, muddy when wet; 10 sectors on long route.

key_segments.name: Via Santa Caterina
key_segments.description: 16% gradient cobbled climb into Piazza del Campo finish.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Twisty undulating route with no long climbs but constant punchy efforts, especially on gravel; signature challenge is the steep finish climb.

logistics.getting_there: Fly into Florence or Pisa; Siena is central with start at Fortezza Medicea and finish at Piazza del Campo, both walkable from city center hotels.
logistics.accommodation: 4* hotels in Siena center like NH Siena; many tour packages available.
logistics.registration_details: Guaranteed entry via official site or operators; choose start pen (grids 1-4); entry from £160 with packages.
logistics.bike_logistics: Bike prep in Siena; supported tours offer assistance; race day bike check.
logistics.local_considerations: Early March weather variable (dusty dry or wet mud); watch pro race day before; enjoy local cuisine like wild boar, pasta, cantucci.

final_verdict.one_liner: Iconic amateur classic on pro white roads with epic Siena finish.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Spring classic enthusiasts seeking pro-level gravel roads, punchy climbs, and Tuscan spectacle.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, premier gravel fondo with notable prestige and atmosphere.
pro_tips: Book early for top start pens
Train punchy hills and gravel handling
Stay in Siena center for pro race viewing
Opt for long route to hit all iconic sectors
